candidates.why: Represents top-line operating income; best match for total revenue/sales among candidates.
Financial income, not operating revenue; reject in favor of operating income.
Net finance result, not revenue.
Tax line, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability; deferred revenue portion only, not total revenue.
Balance sheet current liability; deferred revenue portion only, not total revenue.
Labor expenses but likely includes overhead personnel; not strictly direct cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Clearly SG&A component, not cost of goods sold.
Mixed operating overhead bucket; not specifically direct production costs.
Finance cost, not COGS.
Finance cost, not COGS.

variables.notes: The true cost-of-sales line appears to be 'Cost of inventories', which directly represents inventory-related production costs and numerically aligns as the main operating expense driver. This row was not in the provided candidate list, so it was selected from the full A-column preview and marked for manual review. Candidate rows such as 'Employee benefit expenses' and 'Other operating expenses' are broader operating/overhead costs rather than a clear COGS line. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Cost of inventories

candidates.why: This is income, not an expense; should be excluded from SG&A components.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly an SG&A component (stock-based comp within SG&A).
Bucket of operating overhead; appropriate SG&A-type expense.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total line is given. The best overhead components are the SG&A-specific stock-based compensation line and 'Other operating expenses'. 'Other operating income' is excluded because it is income, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Income statement expense related to capitalized R&D; best available proxy for R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset; not a current-period expense line.
Balance sheet gross R&D asset; not an expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing item for R&D asset; not an expense.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: The only explicit P&L line tied directly to R&D is the amortization of capitalized R&D; balance sheet R&D asset lines are not used as expenses.

candidates.why: Pure interest expense on debt; primary interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense on lease liabilities; another valid interest expense component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful if main line is missing in some years.
Interest income; can be used as a fallback if only net interest is needed, but placed last in priority.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Multiple interest-related rows are provided as a priority list so later processing can pick the first non-missing interest expense per year. Debt interest and lease interest expenses are prioritized before interest income.

candidates.why: Component of equity, but not total book equity.
Represents total equity attributable to shareholders; best match for book equity excluding any non-controlling interest.
Appears numerically identical to 'Shareholders' Equity - Total'; more generic label, used only if no shareholder-specific line existed.
Balancing line, not an economic equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line for the whole balance sheet, not equity alone.
Sum of equity and liabilities; not equity alone.

variables.notes: This line gives total equity attributable to shareholders, which is the appropriate book equity measure. There is no separate non-controlling interest line, so BE is based on shareholder equity only.
No balance sheet line for minority interests or non-controlling interests appears in the preview. MIB is therefore set to 0 (empty selection) by design.
